name: dragnet-investigator
_readme: Multi-agent fraud investigation pipeline. Open this in the RocketRide VS Code extension, wire the nodes on the canvas, run it locally, then one-click deploy to cloud.rocketride.ai. The app calls the deployed endpoint from src/lib/rocketride.ts. This JSON is the reference structure — adjust node `type`/`provider` names to match your installed RocketRide node palette.

nodes._role: AGENT 1 — Risk Scorer. Deterministic 0-100 risk from graph features.
AGENT 2 — Typology Classifier. Names the money-laundering pattern.
nodes.system: You are an AML analyst. Given a fraud-ring feature summary, output ONLY the single best-fit typology label (e.g. 'structuring / smurfing', 'money mule network', 'layering').
nodes.prompt: Ring of {{input.accounts.length}} accounts, {{input.sharedDevices}} shared device/IP fingerprints, {{input.txCount}} internal transfers totaling ${{input.totalAmount}} into one mule. {{score.fresh}} accounts opened in the last 30 days. Typology:

nodes._role: AGENT 3 — Investigator Briefing. Plain-English narrative + action.
nodes.system: You are a senior fraud investigator writing a concise case briefing for an analyst. 2-3 sentences. End with a recommended action.
nodes.prompt: Typology: {{typology.output}}. Risk score: {{score.riskScore}}. Ring: {{input.accounts.length}} accounts funneling ${{input.totalAmount}} into mule {{input.mule}}, sharing {{input.sharedDevices}} device fingerprints. Write the briefing.

nodes.code: return { 'riskScore': score['riskScore'], 'typology': typology['output'], 'narrative': narrate['output'], 'recommendedAction': 'Freeze feeders + mule; file SAR; escalate to Tier-2.' }
